archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) - Modified for Corporate Finance
emotional_tone: Professional, serious, reliable, precise, bank-quality, authoritative

typography.font_setup_instructions: Import Cabinet Grotesk (from Fontshare or local assets) for all headings to establish authority. Import IBM Plex Sans (from Google Fonts) for body text, tables, and especially numerical data to ensure tabular figure clarity. DO NOT USE INTER.

layout_and_spacing.card_structure: border border-slate-200 bg-white rounded-md shadow-sm overflow-hidden
layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align all data tables and numeric labels. Right-align monetary values in tables for decimal alignment. Center-align empty states.

kpi_cards.style: bg-white border border-slate-200 p-5 rounded-md shadow-sm flex flex-col gap-2
kpi_cards.value_style: text-3xl font-bold font-primary tracking-tight text-slate-900 tabular-nums

data_tables.header_style: bg-slate-50 border-b border-slate-200 text-xs font-bold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider py-3 px-4

buttons.primary: bg-slate-900 text-white rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium hover:bg-slate-800 transition-colors shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-700 border border-slate-300 rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors shadow-sm
buttons.export: bg-white text-blue-600 border border-blue-200 rounded-md px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium hover:bg-blue-50 transition-colors flex items-center gap-2

badges.base: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium border

modules_instructions.1_cheques_emitidos: Implement table using Shadcn. Include 'Estado' column using the specified Verde/Amarillo/Gris badges. Allow filtering by state.
modules_instructions.2_cartera_clientes: Table must include real-time client-side calculation: 'Total = Subtotal - Anticipos - Retenciones'. Align numeric columns to the right.
modules_instructions.3_estado_retenciones: Data table showing retention statuses clearly. Use IBM Plex Sans for optimal number readability.
modules_instructions.4_bancos: Display as a grid of 'Bank Cards'. Each card shows: Bank Name/Logo, Saldo, Sobregiro Asignado, and a calculated field 'Disponible' (Saldo + Asignado - Utilizado). Use progress bars or visual indicators for 'Sobregiro utilizado'.
modules_instructions.5_flujo_semanal: Use a timeline or calendar grid component. Must clearly show IN (ingresos) vs OUT (egresos) per day for the current week.
modules_instructions.6_dashboard_gerencial: Top section: 5 KPI cards (Saldo Total Bancos, Cheques Pendientes, Cartera Pendiente, Retenciones, Disponible Real). Middle section: Recharts Line/Area chart for Flujo Semanal and a Bar chart for Cartera por Cliente. Bottom: Recent alerts.
modules_instructions.7_alertas: Implement a dedicated Notification Center (Popover in header) or a Sidebar widget. Differentiate priority (High over-draft vs pending check).
modules_instructions.8_reportes: Add export buttons (Excel/PDF) in the header of each table module using Phosphor Icons or Lucide.
modules_instructions.9_seguridad: Mock role-based views. If Admin/Financiero -> Full edit/view. If Consulta -> Read-only mode, hide action buttons.

motion_and_interaction.hover_effects: Subtle and crisp. Buttons lift slightly (-translate-y-[1px]) with increased shadow. Table rows use a very subtle bg color shift.
motion_and_interaction.transitions: Use 'transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out' universally for color and transform changes.
motion_and_interaction.page_load: Staggered fade-in for dashboard cards and table rows using Framer Motion (e.g., initial opacity 0, y 10, animate to opacity 1, y 0, stagger 0.05s).

icons_and_assets.icon_style: Duotone or Regular weight. Duotone for sidebar navigation items to add premium feel. Regular for table actions.

images.description: High-end modern bank glass facade, symbolizing corporate trust and financial stability.
images.usage: Use as a full-bleed background on the right side of a split-screen login page with a subtle black/50 overlay.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: All text must pass WCAG AA against its background. The gray badge text must be dark enough (`text-slate-700` or `text-slate-800`).
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: MANDATORY: Add `data-testid` to all interactive elements. e.g., `data-testid="nav-bancos"`, `data-testid="export-excel-btn"`, `data-testid="cheque-status-badge"`.
